name: Forex Investment Calculator
metaTitle: Forex Investment Calculator — TCS, LRS Limits, Real Returns | c7xai
metaDescription: Calculate real returns on foreign currency investments after TCS (20% above ₹7L), capital gains tax, bank spreads, and RBI's LRS limits.
shortDescription: Real forex returns after TCS, tax, and bank spreads

faq.question: What is TCS on foreign remittances?
faq.answer: Under LRS (Liberalised Remittance Scheme), TCS of 20% applies on remittances above ₹7L per year (Section 206C(1G)). Below ₹7L, TCS is 0.5%. This is collected by your bank at the time of transfer.

faq.question: What is the RBI LRS limit?
faq.answer: RBI allows Indian residents to remit up to $250,000 per financial year under the Liberalised Remittance Scheme for any permissible current or capital account transaction.

faq.question: How are foreign capital gains taxed in India?
faq.answer: Short-term gains (< 3 years) are taxed at your slab rate. Long-term gains (> 3 years) are taxed at 20% with indexation benefit under the Income Tax Act.
